prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林省理科/物理类最低录取位次依次为约2580名→2414名→2301名→3375名→4783名。2021–2023年位次在2300–2600名区间窄幅波动，2024年吉林省首 年新高考（物理类）位次后移至3375名，2025年进一步后移至4783名，近两年累计后移约2482名，呈明显放宽趋势；该校在吉林省理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年82人、2022年80人、2023年80人、2024年81人、2025年81人，近年基本稳定在80–82人。2026年物理类计划73人，较2025年减少8人，缩招约9.9%，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第39名，近年排名稳定在38–41名区间，属于国内顶尖理工类院校；20 25年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（涉及校园安全事件）；抖音综合热度排名第60位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程、电子科学与技术获评A+，计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全获评A，机械工程获评A-，共5个A类学科，在电子信息领域实力突出，对 考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度为"高热推荐"且小幅升温；计算机类为"推荐"但有所降温；电气工程及其自动化"高热推荐"。该校 核心专业与当前热门工科方向高度契合。吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，物理类考生约7.98万人，较2025年物理类8.04万人略有减少，竞争 压力基本持平。；西安电子科技大学位于陕西省西安市，属跨省招生；该校在吉林省招生计划占比不高，近年约80人左右，2026年 缩至73人，属正常调整范围。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年大幅后移趋势、2026年招生计划缩招约9.9%（竞争加剧）、学校电子信息类优势学科持续高热、吉林省考生规 模基本稳定等因素，在2025年基准4783名基础上，再结合声誉偏负面及专业热度支撑做小幅修正。预测2026年最低 录取位次约4550名，区间4050–5050名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（创新实验班）（通信工程（创新班）、电子信息工程（创新班）、微电子科学与工程（创新班））
- 计算机类（创新实验班）（网络空间安全（实验班）、人工智能（图灵班））
- 电子信息类（集成电路）（微电子科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（通信）（通信工程、信息工程、空间信息与数字技术）
- 计算机类（网络安全）（信息安全、网络空间安全）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）（电子信息工程、信息对抗技术、电磁场与无线技术）
- 计算机类（智能）（智能科学与技术、人工智能）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）（机械设计制造及其自动化、工业设计、自动化、电气工程及其自动化、测控技术与仪器、电子封装技术、机器人工程）
- 材料类（电子材料与微纳器件）（材料科学与工程、电子信息材料、智能材料与结构）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养）（信息管理与信息系统、工业工程、大数据管理与应用）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4050–5050名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（通信类、电子工程类、网络安全类），一档创新实验班可作为冲刺目标（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档自动化 类、材料类可作为保底选择。该校电子信息与计算机类学科实力突出，社会热度高，就业前景良好，适合对信息技术领域有明确兴趣的理科/物理类考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin Province Science/Physics Category were approximately 2580 → 2414 → 2301 → 3375 → 4783. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 2300–2600 from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao (Physics Category) in Jilin, the ranking shifted back to 3375, and further to 4783 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2482 over the past two years, showing a clear easing trend. The university's enrollment plan for Jilin Province Science/Physics Category: 82 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 81 in 2024, 81 in 2025, remaining stable at 80–82 in recent years. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 73, a decrease of 8 from 2025, a reduction of about 9.9%, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 39th, with a stable range of 38–41 in recent years, belonging to top domestic science and engineering institutions. The reputation evaluation during the 2025 Gaokao cycle was somewhat negative (involving campus safety incidents). On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 60th, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium-to-high short video exposure and moderate application attention. No significant gaps in admission records have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering and Electronic Science and Technology were rated A+, Computer Science and Technology and Cyberspace Security were rated A, and Mechanical Engineering was rated A-, totaling 5 A-class disciplines, demonstrating outstanding strength in the field of electronic information, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors was 'highly recommended' and slightly warming up; Computer Science was 'recommended' but cooling down; Electrical Engineering and Automation was 'highly recommended'. The university's core majors are highly aligned with current popular engineering fields. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Jilin Province is about 110,868. Estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 72% in recent years, the number of Physics Category candidates is about 79,800, slightly decreasing from 80,400 in 2025, with roughly equal competitive pressure. Xidian University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, involving cross-province enrollment. Its enrollment plan in Jilin Province is not high, around 80 in recent years, reduced to 73 in 2026, within the normal adjustment range.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 9.9% (intensified competition), the sustained high popularity of the university's electronic information advantageous disciplines, and the basically stable scale of Jilin Province candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 4783, with minor adjustments for the somewhat negative reputation and support from major popularity, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is about 4550, with a range of 4050–5050.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Experimental Class) (Communication Engineering (Innovation Class), Electronic Information Engineering (Innovation Class), Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Innovation Class))
- Computer Science (Innovation Experimental Class) (Cyberspace Security (Experimental Class), Artificial Intelligence (Turing Class))
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits) (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Communication) (Communication Engineering, Information Engineering, Spatial Information and Digital Technology)
- Computer Science (Network Security) (Information Security, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering) (Electronic Information Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Computer Science (Intelligence) (Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Electronic Packaging Technology, Robot Engineering)
- Materials (Electronic Materials and Micro-Nano Devices) (Materials Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Materials, Intelligent Materials and Structures)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digitalization and Business Intelligence Integration) (Information Management and Information Systems, Industrial Engineering, Big Data Management and Application)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4050–5050, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Communication, Electronic Engineering, Network Security) as the main choices. Tier 1 Innovation Experimental Classes can be targeted as reach goals (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range). Tier 3 Automation and Materials majors can serve as safety options. The university's Electronic Information and Computer Science disciplines are outstanding, with high social popularity and good employment prospects, suitable for Science/Physics Category candidates with a clear interest in the information technology field.
